issue: Cursor crashes on shutdown requiring daily reinstall
sample_quotes: Failed to install cursor update on shutdown — uninstalls itself. User must reinstall every day.

issue: Agent dispose deleted checkpoint blobs incorrectly — silent data loss on teardown
sample_quotes: Missing root ref triggered full directory wipe even when checkpoint blobs existed.

issue: Tab completion returning [not_found] on every request — indexing stuck on loading
sample_quotes: Every request logs Error in streaming cpp [not_found]. Tab completely broken. Indexing never completes.

issue: Tab complete shows suggestion but pressing Tab does nothing — or deletes 5-20 unrelated lines
sample_quotes: Must type something first to accept suggestion. When it does accept — deletes unrelated code below cursor. Data loss risk.

issue: Cursor reliably crashes every time Agent mode edits a file
sample_quotes: Reproducible: new folder cleared history all extensions disabled. UI freezes moment Agent edits any file. 100% repro.

issue: Context compression forgets edits from 2 minutes ago
sample_quotes: Not a model bug — compression weights by space occupied not recency. Workaround: shorter sessions.

issue: Single prompt consumed 5M tokens in plan mode — API usage jumped 35% to 75%
sample_quotes: Triggered by adding MCP server. Same task on Codex used 300k tokens. Suspected bug not feature.

issue: Cloud sessions failed to stream over HTTP/1.1 — broke proxies and CI images
sample_quotes: Streaming assumed HTTP/2. All HTTP/1.1 environments broken silently. Fixed in recent release.

issue: .d.ts files referenced unpublished workspace packages — caused TS2305/TS2307 errors
sample_quotes: Published types had internal workspace deps. Silent 'any' on stream types.

issue: Python SDK list_runs returned spurious agent-not-found errors
sample_quotes: Bridge subprocess didn't inherit correct cwd. Fixed in cursor-sdk 0.1.6.

issue: Tab completion hallucinating suggestions aggressively with no context
sample_quotes: Overly aggressive suggestions when no context available. Previously accurate for refactoring — now unreliable.

issue: Agent/editor mode switch button broken — no way to switch back without CMD+E
sample_quotes: Button changes label but doesn't switch modes. Workaround exists (CMD+E) but UX is broken.

issue: Agent deletes files on repeated edits — not intentional deletion but a write bug
sample_quotes: Since update 2.1.50 repeated edits to same file result in file deletion. Bug in Cursor file write mechanism.
